3013450.name: Gunzzle Project Demo
3013450.description:
With your teleporting rifle, challenge your precision, overcome the abysses, fire, acid and many more deadly threats to reach the exit to the next level.

Gunzzle is a beat-the-clock minimalist puzzle platform game, in the purest tradition of 2D arcade game. You will have to perfect your skills to find the perfect trajectory and beat the record to each level.
A pixel precise challenge !

A little too high or a little too low and death is upon you. Every levels offer new challenges with elements and specificities. You will have to try over and over again to be the quickest and find the perfect rebound to catch the bonus, uphold the challenges and reach the portal.

Unlock the 20 levels and all the achievements in the wall of Fame and wall of Shame.

Tips:
Fire burns
Acid melts
Holes do haaaaaaaaaa!
Green walls let balls through
Grey walls let Gunzzle through
Tic toc tic toc times ticking

Basic controls

LEFT click: shoot a bullet warp 

RIGHT click: teleport your hero right to the bullet warp position. 

Q : Move left 

D : Move Right 

R : Reset level

SPACE : pause the game / Menu

Roadmap

Next features for the final version:

With Gunzzle, build your own levels and challenge your friends to the purest skill test. You will need finesse and perseverance to top the leaderboard.

  • Game controllers

    • keyboard + mouse

    • gamepad

  • In game level visuals:

  • UI graphics:

  • Leaderboard:

  • Level editor (work in progress)
